selection.placementCellMapping: map_enemy_placement key is a 128-wide 2x2-tile encounter grid; sector = floor(cellX/4), floor(cellY/2).

statMapping.actions: enemy_configuration_table.yml Action 1-4 plus Action 1-4 Argument; numeric actionType/target decoded from battle_action_table.yml
statMapping.itemRarity: enemy_configuration_table.yml Item Rarity as numerator/denominator odds

spriteFormat.fileType: indexed PNG exported per enemy as BattleSprites/<enemy id>.png

warnings.message: Skipped encounter groups referencing 1 enemy sprite asset(s) missing from BattleSprites.
